content: Yes, I do. You told me your name is Nimish.
how are you? it's been a long time.
I'm doing well, thank you! It's good to hear from you too.
as you know my name and i am a college student currently in my fourth year.
That's interesting, Nimish. What are you studying in your fourth year?
i am a computer science engineer student. so yeah.
That's a great field, Nimish! Are you enjoying your studies?
